queries.feature_definition: Checking account status: no checking account.
queries.question: Empirical investigation into the association between the absence of a checking account and reduced credit default probability.

queries.feature_definition: Checking account status: balance below 0 DM.
queries.question: Statistical analysis of the impact of a checking account balance below zero on the mitigation of credit risk.

queries.feature_definition: Present employment duration: less than 1 year.
queries.question: Determinants of credit risk drivers concerning employment duration less than one year and their contribution to increased default likelihood.
